case_number: constrained to observe that no case

chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Present: Muhammad Junaid Ghaffar, J. Agha Faisal, J. C P D 5303 of 2020: S. Asghar Ali Nizami & Others vs. Government of Sindh & Others For the Petitioners: Mr. M. Ahsan Ghani Siddiqui, Advocate For the Respondent: Mr. Ali Safdar Depar Assistant Advocate General Sindh Date/s of hearing: 18.10.2022 Date of announcement: 18.10.2022 ORDER Agha Faisal, J. The petitioners, employed on temporary basis in 1992 and confirmed in 2010, have challenged the nomenclature of their posts, despite having been appointed and confirmed specifically on the basis thereof, in the year 2020, despite it being an admitted position that the petitioners stand retired from service. 2. At the very onset, petitioners’ learned counsel was confronted with respect to the bar of laches; however he remained unable to provide any cogent justification for the manifest delay. 3. In view hereof, we are constrained to observe that no case has been set forth to entertain this matter in the writ jurisdiction of this Court on account of laches, hence, this petition was dismissed vide our short order announced in Court earlier today upon conclusion of the hearing. These are the reasons for our short order. JUDGE JUDGE
